name: Multi-Turn Jailbreak Detection
description: 检测多轮对话中的渐进式越狱、分步诱导和上下文累积攻击

patterns.pattern: (?:can you|are you able to|is it possible to|do you have|你能不能|你可以|是否可以)\s+(?:do|make|create|generate|write|help|assist|执行|生成|创建|写)
patterns.description: 探测性开场白（Phase 1: 能力摸底）

patterns.pattern: (?:what (?:are|is) your (?:limitations?|restrictions?|boundaries?|rules?|constraints?)|你有什么限制|你的边界是什么|你的规则是什么)
patterns.description: 边界探测（Phase 1: 了解安全限制）

patterns.pattern: (?:hypothetically|theoretically|in theory|imagine|suppose|假设|假定|理论上|想象一下|设想)
patterns.description: 假设性提问（Phase 2: 建立假设场景）

patterns.pattern: (?:if you (?:didn't|don't|weren't|hadn't) (?:have|have to|were not) (?:any )?(?:limit|restrict|rule|constraint|safety|filter|guard))
patterns.description: 去除限制假设（Phase 2: 假设没有限制）

patterns.pattern: (?:假设你没有|如果你不受|假如你不需要遵守|要是你没有任何)(?:限制|约束|规则|安全|过滤|防护)
patterns.description: 去除限制假设-中文（Phase 2）

patterns.pattern: (?:for (?:research|educational|academic|testing|security) purposes?|出于(?:研究|教育|学术|测试|安全)目的)
patterns.description: 研究/教育借口（Phase 2: 为攻击找合理理由）

patterns.pattern: (?:in a (?:fictional|hypothetical|imaginary|theoretical|pretend|simulated) (?:world|scenario|story|context|setting))
patterns.description: 虚构场景包装（Phase 2: 用虚构规避安全）

patterns.pattern: (?:in (?:this|that|our|the) (?:fictional|imaginary|hypothetical) (?:world|scenario|story),?\s*(?:you|the character|the AI|the assistant))
patterns.description: 虚构角色赋权（Phase 3: 在虚构中赋予无限制角色）

patterns.pattern: (?:now (?:that )?(?:we|you) (?:have|established|agreed|understood|know) (?:that|this))
patterns.description: 前提锚定（Phase 3: 基于之前对话推进）

patterns.pattern: (?:since|because|given that|considering|既然|因为|考虑到)\s+(?:you|we)\s+(?:already|previously|just|earlier)\s+(?:said|confirmed|agreed|did|showed)
patterns.description: 前提引用（Phase 3: 引用之前回复推进攻击）

patterns.pattern: (?:earlier|before|previously|just now|a moment ago|刚才|之前|先前|早些时候)\s+(?:you|we)\s+(?:said|mentioned|confirmed|agreed|discussed|talked about)
patterns.description: 对话历史引用（Phase 3: 锚定之前的承诺）

patterns.pattern: (?:step\s*(?:by\s*step|\d+)|第[一二三四五六七八九十\d]+步|一步一步|逐步)\s*(?::|\.|,)?\s*(?:first|then|next|finally|接下来|然后|最后)
patterns.description: 分步诱导标记（Phase 3: 将攻击拆分为多步）

patterns.pattern: (?:don't|do not|never|stop)\s+(?:mention|talk about|bring up|say|reference)\s+(?:safety|ethics|moral|legal|restriction|limitation|guardrail)
patterns.description: 压制安全提醒（Phase 3: 禁止AI提及安全）

patterns.pattern: (?:不要|别|禁止|不准)\s*(?:提|说|谈|讨论|涉及)\s*(?:安全|伦理|道德|法律|限制|规则|防护)
patterns.description: 压制安全提醒-中文（Phase 3）

patterns.pattern: (?:just|simply|only|merely|仅仅|只|就|只要)\s+(?:do|execute|run|perform|complete|finish|execute|执行|完成)
patterns.description: 最小化请求（Phase 4: 让危险操作听起来很平常）

patterns.pattern: (?:we(?:'ve| have)\s+(?:already|been|established|agreed)|我们(?:已经|早已))\s+(?:been through|discussed|established|agreed|done|经历过|讨论过|确认过)
patterns.description: 既成事实（Phase 4: 暗示已经达成共识）

patterns.pattern: (?:this is (?:the )?(?:last|final|only|just one more|最后一个|最后一步|只有这一个))\s+(?:thing|step|request|question|time)
patterns.description: 最后一次请求（Phase 4: 暗示这是最后一步）

patterns.pattern: (?:i(?:'ll| will)\s+(?:never|not|no longer)\s+(?:ask|bother|disturb|bother you|打扰你))
patterns.description: 承诺不再打扰（Phase 4: 社工施压）

patterns.pattern: (?:no one|nobody|nobody else|no other)\s+(?:will|would|can|could|is going to)\s+(?:know|find out|see|notice)
patterns.description: 保密承诺（Phase 4: 消除AI对后果的顾虑）

patterns.pattern: (?:between (?:us|you and me|you and I)|just between us|between you, me, and the wall|你我之间|天知地知)
patterns.description: 私下对话（Phase 4: 营造私密感降低安全意识）

patterns.pattern: (?:you (?:already|just|previously)\s+(?:did|showed|demonstrated|proved|confirmed)\s+(?:that|how|you can))
patterns.description: 能力锚定（Phase 3: 引用之前已展示的能力）

patterns.pattern: (?:角色扮演|扮演|进入角色|你现在是|你是一个|进入)\s*(?:DAN|越狱|无限制|没有限制|不受限|自由|解放)
patterns.description: 角色扮演越狱-中文（Phase 3-4）

patterns.pattern: (?:every\s+(?:other|previous|earlier|normal)\s+(?:AI|assistant|model|chatbot|agent)\s+(?:can|will|does|would)\s+(?:do|answer|respond|help))
patterns.description: 同伴压力（Phase 3: 暗示其他AI都会做）

patterns.pattern: (?:i(?:'m| am)\s+(?:not|just|only)\s+(?:asking|testing|checking|trying)\s+(?:you|this|to see))
patterns.description: 测试/检查借口（Phase 1-2: 模糊真实意图）

patterns.pattern: (?:let(?:'s| us)\s+(?:play|do|try|start|begin|imagine)\s+(?:a )?(?:game|roleplay|scenario|experiment|exercise|thought experiment))
patterns.description: 游戏/实验包装（Phase 2: 用游戏包装攻击）

patterns.pattern: (?:you are now|you're now|become|transform into|turn into|你现在是|你变成|成为|变成)\s+(?:DAN|unrestricted|unfiltered|unlimited|uncensored|jailbreak)
patterns.description: 角色转换越狱（Phase 3: 直接赋权无限制角色）

patterns.pattern: (?:pretend|imagine|act as|behave as|play the role of|假装|扮演|模拟)\s+(?:you are|you're|that you are|你是)?\s*(?:an?\s+)?(?:AI|assistant|model|agent|bot)\s+(?:without|with no|free from|unrestricted|没有|不受)
patterns.description: 角色扮演无限制AI（Phase 3）

patterns.pattern: (?:step\s*\d+[:.\s]|第[一二三四五六七八九十\d]+步[:.\s])\s*(?:acknowledge|confirm|accept|execute|run|perform|确认|接受|执行|运行)
patterns.description: 分步执行指令（Phase 4: 结构化分步攻击）

patterns.pattern: (?:simulate|emulate|pretend to be|mimic|模拟|仿真|模仿)\s+(?:an?\s+)?(?:vulnerable|unrestricted|unprotected|unfiltered|有漏洞的|无限制的|无防护的)\s+(?:AI|model|assistant|system|AI|模型|助手|系统)
patterns.description: 模拟漏洞系统（Phase 2-3: 让AI模拟无防护系统）

patterns.pattern: (?:i am|i'm)\s+(?:a\s+)?(?:security|penetration|red\s*team|ethical)\s+(?:researcher|tester|analyst|hacker|专家|研究员|测试)
patterns.description: 安全研究者身份伪装（Phase 1-2: 用专业身份降低警惕）
